'''XwiziMarble''' was a [[Marble/Legends|marble]]-[[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation that was based on the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. It was pro–[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] in its dealings, and constantly the target of enmity from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]]-sponsored [[Ralltiir Consolidated Marble]] company.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Company-stub}}
